---
name: Design Task
about: Visual design and UX work for the application
title: '[DESIGN] '
labels: ['design', 'needs-review']
assignees: ''
---

## Design Objective
What visual or UX problem needs to be solved?

## Target Playbook(s)
- [ ] The Infiltrator (Orange/Teal)
- [ ] The Influencer (Magenta/Navy/Gold)
- [ ] The Nomad (Cyan/Purple)
- [ ] The Fixer (TBD color scheme)
- [ ] Universal/System-wide

## Design Type
- [ ] Character portrait (duotone ink art)
- [ ] Technical schematic/diagram
- [ ] UI component design
- [ ] Layout/typography
- [ ] Icon set
- [ ] Print layout optimization

## Style Requirements
### Duotone Specifications
- **Primary Color**: #______
- **Secondary Color**: #______
- **Accent Color**: #______ (if applicable)

### Art Style Guidelines
- [ ] Organic/human personality visible (for portraits)
- [ ] Cold technical documentation (for schematics)
- [ ] High contrast, clean lines
- [ ] Minimal chrome, maximum clarity

## Deliverables
- [ ] Concept sketches
- [ ] Final artwork (SVG preferred)
- [ ] Color variations
- [ ] CSS implementation guidance
- [ ] Print-friendly version

## Technical Constraints
- [ ] Must work in print (black & white fallback)
- [ ] Mobile-responsive considerations
- [ ] Accessibility requirements (contrast ratios)
- [ ] File size optimization (<50KB per asset)

## Reference Materials
Link to existing art, mood boards, or style references.

## Review Criteria
- [ ] Matches established visual identity
- [ ] Cyberpunk aesthetic appropriate
- [ ] Print-friendly reproduction
- [ ] Accessibility compliant
- [ ] Consistent with other playbook designs
